case_title: ANDREA ORDOSIA *CI FL040756 PIERCE VS. CALEB GABRIEL PIERCE

docket_entries.description: WAY AGAINST RESP FOR PET, AND HER PLACE OF WORK. FIREARM RESTRICTION/RELINQUISHMENT APPLIES. AS PARTIES ARE STILL IN SAME RESIDENCE, COURT ORDERS
CHECKS SHOULD BE LEFT ON KITCHEN COUNTER AND PET SHALL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR SENDING IN PAYMENT. RESP SHALL LEAVE CHECK FOR HIS PORTION OF EXPENSES
WITHIN 2 DAYS OF RECEIPT OF BILLS. ONCE FRIENDS MOVE OUT, EXPENSES SHALL BE SHARED EQUALLY. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VICKIE GROSS #5525  EXPENSES
STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE
APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
F RESIDENCE FOR ANY PURPOSE. RESP SHALL NOT GO TO LIVING ROOM AND KITCHEN AREA UNTIL AFTER 8PM AND PET SHALL ENSURE NO ONE IS THERE FROM 8PM ON.
(404/MAS) MARK MILSTEAD WITH PET. JANE PITTS WITH RESP. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, COURT ORDERS 1YR STANDARD CONDUCT RO WITH 10 FEET STAY A
